event: Deep venous thrombosis in left leg
Sinus tachycardia at 120 beats per minute
Transfusion of 4 units of red blood cells
Large hematoma in left occipitoparietal region
Hematoma next to right cerebellum and right occipital region
Intracerebral mycotic aneurysm of left posterior cerebral artery
In situ right radial arterial line
Left internal jugular central venous line
Sedation with propofol and sufentanil infusions
Priming with 200 mL of lactated Ringer’s solution
Transfusion of 2 units of red blood cells
Mean arterial blood pressure 70 mm Hg
Replacement of entire valve by biological mitral valve
Transfusion of 4 units of fresh frozen plasma and 1 unit of platelets
Reoperation to remove thromboemboli from left popliteal artery
Resorption of occipital and left cerebellar hematoma
